env.buildPhase:
runHook preBuild
# https://gitlab.haskell.org/ghc/ghc/issues/9221
$SETUP_HS build exe:cardano-node -j$(($NIX_BUILD_CORES > 4 ? 4 : $NIX_BUILD_CORES)) 
runHook postBuild
env.configurePhase:
configFiles=$(mktemp -d)
ghc=$(mktemp -d)
wrappedGhc=$ghc
ghc-pkg init $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d






unwrappedGhc=/nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7
ghcDeps=/nix/store/s8san0l5sd65c092g13bdr2kyzjr59js-ghc-9.6.7-deps
for p in array base binary bytestring containers deepseq directory exceptions filepath ghc-bignum ghc-boot-th ghc-heap ghc-prim integer-gmp integer-simple mtl pretty process rts stm system-cxx-std-lib template-haskell time transformers unix; do
  find $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d -name $p'*.conf' -exec cp -f {} $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d \;
done

sed -i 's|${pkgroot}/../../../../|/nix/store/|' $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d/*.conf
sed -i 's|${pkgroot}|/nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d/..|' $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d/*.conf


for l in "${pkgsHostTarget[@]}"; do
  if [ -d "$l/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d" ] && [[ "$l" != "/nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7" ]]; then
    files=("$l/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d/"*.conf)
    if (( ${#files[@]} )); then
      cp -f "${files[@]}" $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d
    else
      echo "$l/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d didn't contain any *.conf files!"
      exit 1
    fi
  fi
done
for l in "${pkgsHostTarget[@]}"; do
  if [ -d "$l/package.conf.d" ]; then
    files=("$l/package.conf.d/"*.conf)
    if (( ${#files[@]} )); then
      cp -f "${files[@]}" $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d
    else
      echo "$l/package.conf.d didn't contain any *.conf files!"
      exit 1
    fi
  fi
done

echo --package-db=clear >> $configFiles/configure-flags
echo "package-db: clear" >> $configFiles/cabal.config


echo "package-db: global" >> $configFiles/cabal.config
echo --package-db=$configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d >> $configFiles/configure-flags
echo "package-db: $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d" >> $configFiles/cabal.config



echo --flags=ghc-debug --flags=systemd --flags=-unexpected_thunks >> $configFiles/configure-flags

echo "write-ghc-environment-files: never" >> $configFiles/cabal.config


cat > $configFiles/ghc-environment <<EOF
package-db $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d
EOF


echo "--exact-configuration" >> $configFiles/configure-flags
echo "allow-newer: cardano-node:*" >> $configFiles/cabal.config
echo "allow-older: cardano-node:*" >> $configFiles/cabal.config


for p in "${pkgsHostTarget[@]}"; do
  if [ -e $p/envDep ]; then
    cat $p/envDep >> $configFiles/ghc-environment
  fi
  if [ -d $p/exactDep ]; then
  cat $p/exactDep/configure-flags >> $configFiles/configure-flags
  cat $p/exactDep/cabal.config >> $configFiles/cabal.config
fi

done
for p in array base binary bytestring containers deepseq directory exceptions filepath ghc-bignum ghc-boot-th ghc-heap ghc-prim integer-gmp integer-simple mtl pretty process rts stm system-cxx-std-lib template-haskell time transformers unix; do
  if [ -e $ghcDeps/envDeps/$p ]; then
    cat $ghcDeps/envDeps/$p >> $configFiles/ghc-environment
  fi
done
for p in array base binary bytestring containers deepseq directory exceptions filepath ghc-bignum ghc-boot-th ghc-heap ghc-prim integer-gmp integer-simple mtl pretty process rts stm system-cxx-std-lib template-haskell time transformers unix; do
  if [ -e $ghcDeps/exactDeps/$p ]; then
    cat $ghcDeps/exactDeps/$p/configure-flags >> $configFiles/configure-flags
    cat $ghcDeps/exactDeps/$p/cabal.config >> $configFiles/cabal.config
  fi
done
ghc-pkg -v0 --package-db $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d recache

. /nix/store/fj6dvmqy4l4i4jx8hy4bav8ph9jxqjiv-make-shell-wrapper-hook/nix-support/setup-hook

mkdir -p $wrappedGhc/bin
/nix/store/cvm20cv2y6p8rik02wvyzx2w76j5wilc-lndir-1.0.5/bin/lndir -silent $unwrappedGhc $wrappedGhc
rm -rf $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/*/
if [ -d $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/bin ]; then
  ln -s $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/bin $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib
elif [ -d $unwrappedGhc/lib/bin ]; then
  ln -s $unwrappedGhc/lib/bin $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib
fi
if [ -d $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/shims ]; then
  ln -s $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/shims $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib
fi
if [ -d $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/ghcjs-node ]; then
  ln -s $unwrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/ghcjs-node $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib
fi
ln -s $configFiles/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d $wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d

GHC_PLUGINS="["
LIST_PREFIX=""

GHC_PLUGINS="${GHC_PLUGINS}]"

echo "/nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7/lib/ghc-9.6.7" > "$wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/ghc_libdir"

for prg in ghc ghci ghc-9.6.7 ghci-9.6.7; do
  if [[ -x "$unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg" ]]; then
    rm -f $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg
    makeWrapper $unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg                           \
      --add-flags '"-B$NIX_GHC_LIBDIR"'                   \
      --set "NIX_GHC"        "$wrappedGhc/bin/ghc"     \
      --set "NIX_GHCPKG"     "$wrappedGhc/bin/ghc-pkg" \
      --set "NIX_GHC_DOCDIR" "$wrappedGhc/share/doc/ghc/html"                  \
      --set "GHC_PLUGINS"                  "$GHC_PLUGINS"               \
      --set "NIX_GHC_LIBDIR" "$wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib"
  fi
done

for prg in "runghc" "runhaskell"; do
  if [[ -x "$unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg" ]]; then
    rm -f $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg
    makeWrapper $unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg                           \
      --add-flags "-f $wrappedGhc/bin/ghc"                           \
      --set "NIX_GHC"        "$wrappedGhc/bin/ghc"     \
      --set "NIX_GHCPKG"     "$wrappedGhc/bin/ghc-pkg" \
      --set "NIX_GHC_DOCDIR" "$wrappedGhc/share/doc/ghc/html"                  \
      --set "GHC_PLUGINS"                  "$GHC_PLUGINS"               \
      --set "NIX_GHC_LIBDIR" "$wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib"
  fi
done

if [[ -x "/nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7/bin/haddock" ]]; then
  rm -f $wrappedGhc/bin/haddock
  makeWrapper /nix/store/v9w2px6gzylmm01gp11agmy2qbg04qwa-ghc-9.6.7/bin/haddock $wrappedGhc/bin/haddock    \
    --add-flags '"-B$NIX_GHC_LIBDIR"'  \
    --set "NIX_GHC_LIBDIR" "$wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib"
fi

for prg in ghc-pkg ghc-pkg-9.6.7; do
  if [[ -x "$unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg" ]]; then
    rm -f $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg
    makeWrapper $unwrappedGhc/bin/$prg $wrappedGhc/bin/$prg --add-flags "--global-package-db=$wrappedGhc/lib/ghc-9.6.7/lib/package.conf.d"
  fi
done



rm -rf $wrappedGhc/share/doc $wrappedGhc/share/man $wrappedGhc/share/devhelp/books
PATH=$wrappedGhc/bin:$PATH

runHook preConfigure
echo Configure flags:
printf "%q " --prefix=$out exe:cardano-node $(cat $configFiles/configure-flags) --with-ghc=ghc --with-ghc-pkg=ghc-pkg --with-hsc2hs=hsc2hs --with-gcc=cc --with-ar=ar --with-strip=strip --disable-executable-stripping --disable-library-stripping --disable-library-profiling --disable-profiling --enable-static --enable-shared --disable-executable-dynamic --disable-coverage --enable-library-for-ghci --datadir=$data/share/ghc-9.6.7 --enable-split-sections --ghc-option=-Werror --ghc-options="-finfo-table-map" --ghc-options="-fdistinct-constructor-tables"
echo
$SETUP_HS configure --prefix=$out exe:cardano-node $(cat $configFiles/configure-flags) --with-ghc=ghc --with-ghc-pkg=ghc-pkg --with-hsc2hs=hsc2hs --with-gcc=cc --with-ar=ar --with-strip=strip --disable-executable-stripping --disable-library-stripping --disable-library-profiling --disable-profiling --enable-static --enable-shared --disable-executable-dynamic --disable-coverage --enable-library-for-ghci --datadir=$data/share/ghc-9.6.7 --enable-split-sections --ghc-option=-Werror --ghc-options="-finfo-table-map" --ghc-options="-fdistinct-constructor-tables"
runHook postConfigure
env.installPhase:
runHook preInstall
$SETUP_HS copy 

mkdir -p $data

runHook postInstall
env.name: cardano-node-exe-cardano-node-11.0.1
